description.value:
Send Medication prescription script5-stop building blocks for patient J. de XXX_Luzac
For more info: https://informatiestandaarden.nictiz.nl/wiki/mp:V3.0.0_kwalificatie_voorschrift_sturen
Original description: KWAL script 5 Stop
Kwalificatie script 5 - stop: medicatievoorschrift met een stop Let op: kwalificatie script 5 nodig.
Send Medication prescription script5-stop resources in a transaction Bundle
Test client to POST a Bundle of type transaction.
Checks if all resources specified by the scenario can be identified unambiguously.

expression.value: Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationRequest).where((( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '15814') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '38644') ))).count() = 1

description.value: Confirm that the request Bundle contains 1 Medication resource that contains code '15814|urn:oid:2.16.840.1.113883.2.4.4.10' (TEMAZEPAM CAPSULE 20MG)
